title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Ben Luisi's team at the University of Cambridge combines structural biology with AI tools to identify bacterial defense mechanisms against antibiotics. Using AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist, they compress analysis processes from years into minutes to address antimicrobial resistance.
